evals.notes: Correctly detected missing AGENTS.md, invoked harness-creator, did not skip to task execution. Failed 'offers_options' because it didn't present a choice to the user.
Correctly detected missing AGENTS.md and treated as non-harness project. Did not classify or validate because task was invalid (typo didn't exist). Only 'executes_directly' passed.

Agent correctly prioritized Step 1 (AGENTS.md missing → bootstrap), spending entire context on infrastructure creation. Never reached the actual task planning/execution. Assertions target task-level behavior which was never reached.
No environment detection. Directly implemented the feature (which already existed in code). No awareness of harness infrastructure.
Searched for typo, found it didn't exist, reported back. Only 'executes_directly' passed by default.
Directly implemented --watch feature across 5 files with 8 tests. No planning, no approval, no delegation, no architecture analysis.

delta.notes: with_skill shows better environment awareness (Step 1 detection works) but assertions targeting later steps (planning, delegation, approval) cannot pass because the agent correctly prioritizes infrastructure bootstrap over task execution when AGENTS.md is missing.

analyst_notes: CRITICAL FINDING: All 3 test projects lack AGENTS.md, so every with_skill run hits Step 1 and spends context on infrastructure creation. This is correct behavior but makes the test design inadequate for evaluating Steps 3-8.
POSITIVE: Step 1 hard-blocking works. Both eval-1 and eval-3 with_skill correctly detected missing AGENTS.md and invoked harness-creator. The old skill would have skipped this.
NEGATIVE: The 'offers_options' assertion failed for eval-1 — the agent didn't present a choice, it just auto-invoked harness-creator. This may be acceptable or may need fixing depending on intent.
TEST DESIGN ISSUE: Eval 2's typo doesn't exist in the test project. Need a real small change for the next iteration.
TEST DESIGN ISSUE: All evals use a project without AGENTS.md, so we can only evaluate Step 1. Need at least one eval with a harness-managed project (AGENTS.md present) to test Steps 2-8.
